title: Update Plexus Tactus dependency after package release
description:
After the Tactus package containing reasoning_effort and verbosity support is published, update Plexus dependency pins and lockfiles to that version.

Definition of Done:
- pyproject dependency points at the released Tactus version.
- score-processor lambda requirements use the released Tactus version.
- Lockfile is refreshed if required by the project workflow.
- TactusScore tests pass against the packaged dependency.
